# Tooltip

A tooltip component that displays a brief informational message when hovering over or focusing on a trigger element.

## Import

```jsx
import { Tooltip } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Tooltip` | The root component that manages tooltip state. |
| `Tooltip.Trigger` | The element that triggers the tooltip on hover/focus. |
| `Tooltip.Content` | The floating content panel of the tooltip. |
| `Tooltip.Arrow` | An arrow pointing from the tooltip to the trigger. |
| `Tooltip.Positioner` | Controls the positioning of the tooltip content. |

## Props

### Tooltip

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `content` | `ReactNode` | - | Shorthand for tooltip content text. |
| `positioning` | `object` | - | Positioning options (e.g., `{ placement: "top" }`). |
| `openDelay` | `number` | `300` | Delay in milliseconds before the tooltip opens. |
| `closeDelay` | `number` | `0` | Delay in milliseconds before the tooltip closes. |

## Usage

### Basic Tooltip

```jsx
<Tooltip content="This is a tooltip">
  <Tooltip.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Hover me</Button>
  </Tooltip.Trigger>
</Tooltip>
```

### Tooltip with Arrow

```jsx
<Tooltip>
  <Tooltip.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Hover me</Button>
  </Tooltip.Trigger>
  <Tooltip.Positioner>
    <Tooltip.Content>
      <Tooltip.Arrow />
      Tooltip with an arrow
    </Tooltip.Content>
  </Tooltip.Positioner>
</Tooltip>
```

### Tooltip Placement

```jsx
<Tooltip content="Top tooltip" positioning={{ placement: "top" }}>
  <Tooltip.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Top</Button>
  </Tooltip.Trigger>
</Tooltip>

<Tooltip content="Right tooltip" positioning={{ placement: "right" }}>
  <Tooltip.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Right</Button>
  </Tooltip.Trigger>
</Tooltip>
```

### Tooltip with Custom Delay

```jsx
<Tooltip content="Slow tooltip" openDelay={500} closeDelay={200}>
  <Tooltip.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Hover me (slow)</Button>
  </Tooltip.Trigger>
</Tooltip>
```
